notes: All five assertions passed for both configurations in every eval, so the current checks are non-discriminating and cannot detect quality improvements.
Timing and token capture from subagent completion notifications was unavailable in this execution environment; time_seconds is 0.0 for all runs and token values are derived from output size proxy.

Qualitative output differences exist (wording/coverage), but current assertions emphasize structural completeness; add quality-sensitive assertions for ambiguity handling and assumption quality in iteration 2.
